name: NIST SSDF: PW — Security Review / Analysis
description: Code is reviewed and/or analyzed for security before it is accepted (PW.7/PW.8).
rationale: SSDF PW.7/PW.8: review and/or analyze human-readable code, and test executable code, to identify vulnerabilities and verify compliance with security requirements.

examples.fails: the required secure-development step is absent

source: NIST SP 800-218 — Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF) v1.1, organised into PO (Prepare the Organization), PS (Protect the Software), PW (Produce Well-Secured Software), RV (Respond to Vulnerabilities). https://csrc.nist.gov/Projects/ssdf
